---
title: "Appendix A: Additional Material"
---

## A.1 Robustness checks

The main regression in Chapter 4 was re-estimated under three robustness specifications. All within 0.05 standard deviations of the result in Table @tbl-results.

## A.2 Callout boxes

::: {.callout-note}
## Methodological note

The regression assumes the error term is uncorrelated with the regressors.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Practical tip

Run `uomthesis::list_csl()` to see the bundled citation styles.
:::

## A.3 Mathematical derivations

Let $\mathbf{X}$ be the $n \times k$ design matrix. The OLS estimator is:

$$
\hat{\boldsymbol{\beta}} = \left( \mathbf{X}^{\top} \mathbf{X} \right)^{-1} \mathbf{X}^{\top} \mathbf{y}
$$
